_comment: GEO Agent Team — Client Configuration Schema
target_audience: Small to mid-size business operations managers and team leads, 30-50 employees, non-technical
target_queries: best project management tools for small business
how to manage a project team
what is a sprint in project management
how to prioritize tasks in a project
what is a project management office PMO
how to create a project plan
how to manage multiple projects at once
how to onboard team to project management software
project management software for marketing teams

_field_descriptions.domain: The client's primary website domain (no https:// prefix)
_field_descriptions.niche: Specific niche/industry description — be specific, not generic
_field_descriptions.target_audience: Detailed description of the ideal reader — role, company size, sophistication level
_field_descriptions.competitors: Up to 5 competitor domains to monitor (no https:// prefix)
_field_descriptions.target_queries: 30-50 search queries to track for AI visibility. Mix of: definitions, how-tos, comparisons, and use-case queries
_field_descriptions.brand_voice_cache: Path to a previously extracted brand voice JSON file, relative to geo-team/ directory. Set to null to re-extract. Example: 'clients/acme-saas-brand-voice.json'
_field_descriptions.max_budget_usd: Maximum USD budget for this run across all agents. Default: 5. Increase for more thorough research.
